hooks.name: litestar-session-start
hooks.command: r="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; if [ -n "$r" ] && [ ! -f "${r%/}/hooks/session-start.sh" ]; then r=""; fi; if [ -z "$r" ]; then for d in "$HOME"/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/litestar "$HOME"/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/*/plugins/litestar; do [ -f "$d/hooks/session-start.sh" ] && r="$d" && break; done; fi; if [ -z "$r" ] && [ -f ./hooks/session-start.sh ]; then r="."; fi; [ -n "$r" ] || exit 0; CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT="${r%/}" bash "${r%/}/hooks/session-start.sh"
hooks.description: Inject project-aware Litestar skill reminders into the session context.
